description: Use the N/email module to send email messages from within NetSuite. You can use the N/email module to send regular, bulk, and campaign email.

methods.name: send
methods.description: Sends transactional email to an individual or group of recipients and receives bounceback notifications.

params.name: options
params.description: Email options object.

params.name: options.author
params.description: Internal ID of the email sender. To find the internal ID of the sender in the UI, go to Lists > Employees.

params.name: options.recipients
params.description: The internal ID or email address of the recipient(s). For multiple recipients, use an array of internal IDs or email addresses.

params.name: options.subject
params.description: Subject of the outgoing message.

params.name: options.body
params.description: Contents of the outgoing message. SuiteScript formats the body in either plain text or HTML.

params.name: options.replyTo
params.description: The email address that appears in the reply-to header.

params.name: options.cc
params.description: The internal ID or email address of the secondary recipient(s) to copy.

params.name: options.bcc
params.description: The internal ID or email address of the recipient(s) to blind copy.

params.name: options.attachments
params.description: Email file attachments. Supported for server scripts only.

params.name: options.relatedRecords
params.description: Object that contains key-value pairs to associate the Message record with related records (transactionId, entityId, customRecord, activityId).

params.name: options.relatedRecords.transactionId
params.description: The Transaction record to attach the Message record to.

params.name: options.relatedRecords.entityId
params.description: The Entity record to attach the Message record to.

params.name: options.relatedRecords.customRecord
params.description: The custom record to attach the Message record to. Must specify both id and recordType.

params.name: options.relatedRecords.activityId
params.description: The Activity record to attach the Message record to.

params.name: options.isInternalOnly
params.description: If true, the Message record is not visible to an external Entity. Default is false.

methods.name: send.promise
methods.description: Sends transactional email asynchronously to an individual or group of recipients and receives bounceback notifications.

params.name: options
params.description: Same parameters as email.send(options).

methods.name: sendBulk
methods.description: Sends bulk email (for use when a bounceback notification is not required).

params.name: options
params.description: Bulk email options object.

params.name: options.author
params.description: Internal ID of the email sender.

params.name: options.recipients
params.description: The internal ID or email address of the recipient(s).

params.name: options.subject
params.description: Subject of the outgoing message.

params.name: options.body
params.description: Contents of the outgoing message.

params.name: options.replyTo
params.description: The email address that appears in the reply-to header.

params.name: options.cc
params.description: The internal ID or email address of the secondary recipient(s) to copy.

params.name: options.bcc
params.description: The internal ID or email address of the recipient(s) to blind copy.

params.name: options.attachments
params.description: Email file attachments. Supported for server scripts only.

params.name: options.relatedRecords
params.description: Object to associate the Message record with related records.

params.name: options.isInternalOnly
params.description: If true, the Message record is not visible to an external Entity.

methods.name: sendBulk.promise
methods.description: Sends bulk email asynchronously (for use when a bounceback notification is not required).

params.name: options
params.description: Same parameters as email.sendBulk(options).

methods.name: sendCampaignEvent
methods.description: Sends a single 'on-demand' campaign email to a specified recipient and returns a campaign response ID.

params.name: options
params.description: Campaign event options.

params.name: options.campaignEventId
params.description: The internal ID of the campaign event. The campaign must use a Lead Nurturing (campaigndrip) sublist.

params.name: options.recipientId
params.description: The internal ID of the recipient. The recipient's record must contain an email address.

methods.name: sendCampaignEvent.promise
methods.description: Sends a single 'on-demand' campaign email asynchronously to a specified recipient and returns a campaign response ID.

params.name: options
params.description: Campaign event options.

params.name: options.campaignEventId
params.description: The internal ID of the campaign event.

params.name: options.recipientId
params.description: The internal ID of the recipient.
